message:
🐛 Fix GPU utilization 401: add auth to utilization API calls (#1727)

* ✨ Add reservation search + reduce poll interval to 20min

- Change GPU utilization worker poll interval from 1 hour to 20 minutes
- Add keyword search input on the Reservations tab to filter by title,
  namespace, user, cluster, GPU type, description, notes, and status

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix utilization API auth: use api client instead of bare fetch

The useGPUUtilizations hook was using bare fetch() without auth headers,
causing 401 on every /api/gpu/utilizations request. Switch to the api
client which includes the Bearer token automatically.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
